app_release_notes: v0.16.14 - User Guide PDF now has a Step 11 page on the in-workbook Help tab. Workbook hardened: gridlines and row/column headers hidden on every user-facing sheet, workbook structure locked, and only the cells you legitimately need to edit are unlocked (OAL on Powder Charge Log and Seating Depth Log row 10, plus the four weighting factors on Charts row 11 and Seating Depth Log row 28). Everything else is read-only - Loadscope writes via openpyxl, accidental clicks in Excel can not break anything.
